overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with green hair walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses a covered red-lit walkway, emerges into open streets with towering digital billboards, descends into a dark graffiti-covered underpass, and ascends to an elevated pedestrian walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with red overhead beams

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered corridor following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction as ego

entered.detail: structural beams with red lighting forming the ceiling of the walkway
large vertical concrete support columns along the left side
modern glass building with reflective windows on the right side
simple concrete seating along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by red overhead beams. Two NPCs walk ahead in the distance, and the corridor is flanked by concrete pillars on the left and a glass building facade on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban intersection with towering neon billboards

events.description: exits covered walkway into open city street with bright multicolored neon signage
ambient lighting shifts from red to vibrant neon blues, greens, and oranges from billboards

agents.ego_description: crossing the open intersection and continuing along the city sidewalk past various pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic car driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital billboards displaying colorful advertisements and Japanese text
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows towering above the street
orange and white striped barriers along the edge of the walkway
tall street light with horizontal neon tube illumination

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens into a vast neon-lit urban intersection. Towering glass skyscrapers and massive digital billboards illuminate the night sky. The character walks past traffic barriers as a futuristic vehicle drives by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass with graffiti-covered walls and stairs

events.description: enters dark underpass area with green ambient lighting and graffiti-covered surfaces
passes close by a large shirtless NPC with green hair standing in the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit underpass and passing a large standing NPC

notable_agents.action: large shirtless NPC with green hair standing still in the underpass

entered.detail: concrete stairs covered in blue and white graffiti tags leading downward
rough concrete walls with graffiti and trash bags piled at the base
sickly green light illuminating the underpass from unseen sources

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a dark, gritty underpass illuminated by green ambient light. Graffiti covers the concrete walls and stairs. A large NPC with distinctive green hair stands in the path as the character passes by closely.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway ascending to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending concrete stairs to reach upper pedestrian level

agents.ego_description: climbing the concrete stairs to reach the elevated pedestrian walkway

entered.detail: metal railing along the left side of the concrete stairs
opening at the top of the stairs leading to the elevated path

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete stairway with metal railings, leaving the dark underpass behind. The lighting transitions from green to warmer tones as the character approaches the upper walkway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with food stalls overlooking the city

events.description: emerges onto elevated walkway with view of city streets below and neon signs in distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated walkway past food vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with backpack walking in opposite direction on the elevated path

entered.detail: blue and yellow food vending stall with illuminated display
safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway
view of the city streets and buildings below the elevated path

segments.scene_description: Now on the elevated walkway, the character moves past a food vending stall while overlooking the neon-lit city below. The path continues forward with railings on the left and buildings on the right, with other pedestrians sharing the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a confined red corridor into a vast urban center and then through a gritty underpass. It begins within a covered pedestrian walkway illuminated by red overhead beams, moving past concrete pillars and a glass facade toward the city's open air. As the character emerges, the scene expands into a massive intersection dominated by towering skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards, with a futuristic vehicle passing by on the left. The camera then descends into a dark, graffiti-covered underpass bathed in green ambient light, passing a distinctive NPC before ascending a concrete stairway that shifts the lighting back to warmer tones. Finally, the movement leads onto an elevated walkway, passing a food vending stall while overlooking the sprawling neon cityscape below.
